name: Warm Potato Salad with Apple and Curry Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine vinegar, ginger, garlic, and shallots.
2. In a small saut pan, dry saut the curry until you can smell the aroma.
3. Add the saut curry to the vinegar mixture and whisk well.
4. Add sweet hot chili sauce to the mixture and whisk again to combine.
5. Slowly whisk in the oil until thick and season with soy sauce.
To combine:
6. Place warm potatoes in a bowl, add apples and walnuts, and toss.
7. Add the dressing and toss well.
8. Serve warm. Serves 6
